parameters_table:
## Parameters

| Parameter | Description | Default | Required |
|-----------|-------------|---------|----------|
| `requirements_path` | Path to the PRD markdown file | `docs/reqs/main.md` | No |
| `specs_path` | Path to technical specifications directory | `docs/specs` | No |
| `config_path` | Path to synthex project config | `.synthex/config.yaml` | No |
note: Pre-native-looping baseline captured before Phase 4/5 added --loop. Body text intentionally omitted; only deterministic envelope (frontmatter + Parameters + heading structure) is preserved.
